jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Firstcry - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
